## Hacknet.upgradeCore() method

Upgrade the core of a hacknet node.

**Signature:**

```typescript
upgradeCore(index: number, n?: number): boolean;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

index

</td><td>

Index/Identifier of Hacknet Node.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

n


</td><td>

number


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Number of cores to purchase. Must be positive. Will be rounded to the nearest integer. Defaults to 1 if not specified.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

boolean

True if the Hacknet Node’s cores are successfully purchased, false otherwise.

## Remarks

RAM cost: 0.5 GB

Tries to purchase n cores for the specified Hacknet Node.

Returns true if it successfully purchases n cores for the Hacknet Node or if it purchases some positive amount and the Node reaches its max number of cores.

Returns false otherwise.
